LanguageData.VQEA_PneumaticTubeLaunchPort.description: A large transfer station for the ancient pneumatic tube network. It was used to send supply capsules between distant vaults, moving food, tools, and research materials through sealed underground tunnels. Cargo can still be loaded and launched, and a return capsule may arrive from another vault after some time.
LanguageData.VQEA_PneumaticTubeLaunchPort.label: pneumatic tube launch port
LanguageData.VQEA_PneumaticTubes.description: A network of ancient tubes used to deliver small and medium items between vaults. Some of the capsules remain stuck inside.
LanguageData.VQEA_PneumaticTubes.label: pneumatic tubes
LanguageData.VQEA_PneumaticTubes_Corner.description: A network of ancient tubes used to deliver small and medium items between vaults. Some of the capsules remain stuck inside.
LanguageData.VQEA_PneumaticTubes_Corner.label: pneumatic tubes
LanguageData.VQEA_PneumaticTubes_Long.description: A network of ancient tubes used to deliver small and medium items between vaults. Some of the capsules remain stuck inside.
LanguageData.VQEA_PneumaticTubes_Long.label: pneumatic tubes
LanguageData.VQEA_PneumaticTubes_Terminus.description: The pneumatic tubes network had an exit port here. It is empty.
LanguageData.VQEA_PneumaticTubes_Terminus.label: empty pneumatic tubes terminus
LanguageData.VQEA_PneumaticTubes_Terminus_Closed.desc: The pneumatic tubes network had an exit port here. It can be opened to access its contents.
LanguageData.VQEA_PneumaticTubes_Triple.description: A network of ancient tubes used to deliver small and medium items between vaults. Some of the capsules remain stuck inside.
LanguageData.VQEA_PneumaticTubes_Triple.label: pneumatic tubes
LanguageData.VQEA_PneumaticTubes_Underground.descript: A network of ancient tubes used to deliver small and medium items between vaults. Some of the capsules remain stuck inside.
LanguageData.VQEA_PneumaticTubes_Underground.label: underground pneumatic tubes
LanguageData.VQEA_PneumaticTubes_Wall.description: A network of ancient tubes used to deliver small and medium items between vaults. Some of the capsules remain stuck inside.
LanguageData.VQEA_PneumaticTubes_Wall.label: pneumatic tubes
